pro_feature_batch_desc.message: Download all images at once with a single click

pro_feature_batch_desc_pro.message: Unlimited downloads — select all images and export as ZIP in one click

pro_feature_color_desc_pro.message: Auto-extract dominant colors; click any swatch to copy HEX code instantly

pro_feature_dedup_desc.message: Detect and remove duplicate images automatically

pro_feature_dedup_desc_pro.message: Perceptual-hash smart dedup — no wasted space from duplicate downloads

pro_feature_multitab_desc.message: Extract images from multiple tabs at once

pro_feature_multitab_desc_pro.message: Batch extract from all open tabs and bundle into a single ZIP — no tab switching

pro_feature_reverse_search_desc.message: Find the source of any image with reverse search

pro_feature_reverse_search_desc_pro.message: One-click search on Google, TinEye, Yandex & Baidu to find any image's origin

pro_headline_variant_a.message: Unlock the Full Power of Image Harvest

pro_headline_variant_b.message: Go Pro — Save Hours Every Week

pro_trial_desc.message: Try all Pro features free for 7 days. No commitment required.

pro_trial_perk_full_access.message: Full access to all Pro features

pro_trial_started_toast.message: Pro trial activated! Enjoy all features for 7 days.

trial_grace_message.message: Your trial has expired. Pro features available for {days} more day(s). Upgrade to keep access.

welcome_subtitle.message: The smartest way to find, filter, and batch-download images from any webpage. Your 7-day Pro trial is now active.

welcome_trial_desc.message: All Pro features are unlocked. Explore everything — no credit card required.

welcome_feature_batch_desc.message: Download up to 1000 images as ZIP. Convert formats on the fly (PNG, JPG, WebP).

welcome_feature_multitab_desc.message: Scan images across multiple open tabs at once. Perfect for research and comparison.

welcome_feature_similar_desc.message: Find duplicates and near-duplicates using perceptual hashing (pHash) technology.

welcome_feature_grouping_desc.message: Group images by domain, format, size range, or tab. 5 smart grouping modes.

welcome_feature_color_desc.message: Extract dominant colors from any image. Copy HEX codes and filter by color.

welcome_feature_collections_desc.message: Save images with tags and notes. Organize across sessions and export as ZIP.

welcome_cta_desc.message: Visit any webpage and click the Image Harvest icon to begin scanning.

welcome_footer.message: Your trial ends in 7 days · No credit card required

restricted_subtitle.message: This page restricts content scripts. Try a different page.

title_upgrade_copy_color.message: Upgrade to Pro to copy colors

settings_all_frames_desc.message: Also scan images inside iframes and embedded frames

settings_color_extract_desc.message: Extract dominant colors from each image for filtering

settings_download_options_desc.message: Customize subfolder, filename template, and format conversion

settings_live_monitor_desc.message: Automatically detect new images as the page content changes

settings_max_size_desc.message: Hide images larger than the specified dimensions

settings_no_warning_desc.message: Skip the confirmation dialog when downloading many files

settings_similar_desc.message: Find and group visually similar or duplicate images

settings_telemetry_desc.message: Send anonymous feature-usage events. No URLs, no images, no personal info.

restricted_notice.message: This page does not allow extensions to inject scripts. Navigate to a regular webpage (e.g. an article, gallery, or search results) to start extracting images.

restricted_features_heading.message: What you can do with Image Harvest

restricted_feature_batch_desc.message: Select and download all images from any webpage with one click. Filter by size, format, or layout.

restricted_feature_dedup_desc.message: Automatically find and remove near-duplicate images using perceptual hashing.

restricted_feature_reverse_desc.message: Look up any image across Google, TinEye, Yandex, and Baidu with a single click.

restricted_feature_multitab_desc.message: Extract images from multiple open tabs at once and download them all in a ZIP archive.

restricted_feature_color_desc.message: Automatically extract dominant colors from each image. Click any swatch to copy the hex code.

restricted_feature_filter_desc.message: Filter images by size, type, layout, URL pattern, or dominant color to find exactly what you need.

restricted_feature_collection_desc.message: Bookmark images to a persistent collection that stays across sessions. Organize and revisit anytime.

restricted_feature_preview_desc.message: View full-resolution images with metadata — dimensions, file size, and format — at a glance.
